xray.group.FilterExpression.Docs: The filter expression defining the parameters to include traces.

xray.group.GroupName.Docs: The unique case-sensitive name of the group.

xray.group.InsightsConfiguration.Docs: The structure containing configurations related to insights.  + The InsightsEnabled boolean can be set to true to enable insights for the group or false to disable insights for the group.+ The NotificationsEnabled boolean can be set to true to enable insights notifications through Amazon EventBridge for the group.

xray.group.Tags.Docs: An array of key-value pairs to apply to this resource.  For more information, see [Tag](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AWSCloudFormation/latest/UserGuide/aws-properties-resource-tags.html).
